title: hydrocotyle microphylla
intro: Hydrocotyle microphylla, also known as pennywort or gotu kola, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of hydrocotyle microphylla include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Hydrocotyle microphylla is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
